note: The provider directory behind the Hire tab. Every listing is M-Verified before it appears; intake runs through interview.html (talent) and list-your-space.html (venues).

providers.name: Matthew McCluster
providers.headline: Creative director · the builder of this site
providers.blurb: Sony A7R V kit, cinematic edits, and sites like the one you're on. Photography, videography, and web builds from $10k.

terms.notes: The Artist Offer: $1,000 for a feature — and the thousand comes with 50% of the songwriting, 50% of the publishing, 50% of everything. Signed in the Market before the song drops.

providers.name: Decibel Studios
providers.headline: Zakir's boutique recording room
providers.blurb: A boutique recording studio dedicated to bringing artists' musical vision to life. Zakir behind the board — writer, BMI, the six-string on the Vaunt EP.

providers.name: K-Cohiba
providers.headline: Boston artist — the catalogue lands as he claims it
providers.area: Boston, MA · onboarding — final rates being confirmed with the team
providers.blurb: Boston artist joining the network. His songs load through his own desk, his shows book through the team, and his ticker trades on the market.

providers.name: Revent Space
providers.headline: Dorchester's community event room — furnished, lit, ready by 10am
providers.blurb: A community-first event room in Dorchester: 32 seated at tables, up to 48 for a mixer, with the 65″ smart display, mic, speakers, and LED color lighting already in the room. Pop-ups, seminars, brunches, showers, open mics — bookable 10am to midnight.

providers.name: Revent Work Lounge & Photo Studio
providers.headline: 1,200 sq ft of natural light — shoots by day, sessions all week
providers.blurb: Revent's second room: 1,200 square feet of natural light built for photo sessions and focused work — with a 15-seat conference room, whiteboard, grass wall, 65″ smart display, Bluetooth speakers, LED bar uplighting, and WiFi.

providers.name: Laire
providers.headline: Cameraman · M Network
providers.blurb: Behind the camera on the M Network roster. Full page landing with his reel as onboarding completes — bookings route through the network desk meanwhile.

providers.name: The Pull-Up · McCluster mobile
providers.headline: The engineer comes to you — recording, shoot, edit, on site
providers.area: Books by zone · exact locations never published
providers.blurb: Mobile engineering and content: the kit pulls up to your spot. Travel is priced by zone and folded into one payment; you get an arrival window with a built-in buffer, and neither side's address is ever published.
